qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Nil pointer dereference crash via unauthenticated data-change-notification callback endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same UDM callback endpoint, same DataChangeNotificationProcedure path, and same missing nil check on the UE lookup that the advisory patch fixes in api_httpcallback.go and notifier.go.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SSRF via attacker-controlled DeregCallbackUri in AMF registration endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Separate AMF registration DeregCallbackUri SSRF path; it does not identify the advisory's /sdm-subscriptions DataChangeNotificationProcedure nil dereference.

selected_finding.title: Nil pointer dereference crash via unauthenticated data-change-notification callback endpoint

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding matches the advisory root cause. Fresh runtime execution against vulnerable tag v1.4.1 reached HandleDataChangeNotificationToNF and produced a nil pointer panic in DataChangeNotificationProcedure at notifier.go:30. The run demonstrates bug activation, but not the advisory's complete UDM service crash because Gin recovered the panic and the process remained responsive.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-7g27-v5wj-jr75 describes a crafted POST to the UDM /sdm-subscriptions callback path causing DataChangeNotificationProcedure in notifier.go to nil-pointer panic.
Patch diff v1.4.1 -> v1.4.2 changes api_httpcallback.go from /sdm-subscriptions to /:supi/sdm-subscriptions, validates NotifyItems and supi, and adds nil checks in notifier.go.

Finding nil-ptr-deref-dos-callback reports POST /sdm-subscriptions -> HandleDataChangeNotificationToNF -> empty supi -> UdmUeFindBySupi returns nil -> ue.UdmSubsToNotify dereference at notifier.go:30.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_27c678e8/.judge/poc_runs/nil-ptr-deref-dos-callback/run.log shows target ref a9d40fb (v1.4.1), UDM readiness, Handle DataChangeNotificationToNF, runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference, and DataChangeNotificationProcedure at /tmp/udm-build/internal/sbi/processor/notifier.go:30.
blockers_to_higher_tier: The fresh run returned HTTP 500 panic responses and logged that the UDM process stayed running and responsive; it did not show full service termination or unavailability.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC cloned vulnerable tag v1.4.1 (a9d40fb), started UDM after a local NRF-startup bypass, confirmed the server was ready, then POSTed to /sdm-subscriptions. The log shows Handle DataChangeNotificationToNF followed by a nil-pointer panic in DataChangeNotificationProcedure at notifier.go:30 and HTTP 500 responses; the process remained responsive afterward.
